title: Palburgo's Enhanced
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack enhancing performance, visuals, and quality of life for a smoother experience.
body:
![Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32d6409f3a9539c7ef17fe7669a370b4af742c13_0.webp)

## 🔹 Description ##
**Palburgo’s Enhanced** is a **Fabric-based modpack** that **improves performance, visuals, and quality of life** while staying **true to Minecraft’s original feel**. It’s designed for players who want a **smoother, more immersive experience without overwhelming changes** or heavy content additions.

## ✨ Key Features ##
- **Performance Boost**: Optimized mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight drastically improve FPS and reduce lag.
- **Enhanced Visuals**: Subtle improvements such as connected textures, shaders support (via Iris), and dynamic lighting.
- **Quality of Life**: HUD enhancements, better menus, improved tooltips, and more.
- **Lightweight & Multiplayer-Friendly**: Works great in both singleplayer and multiplayer without losing the vanilla charm.

## 📦 Mods Included (Highlights) ##
- **Appleskin** – Displays hunger & saturation.
- **BetterF3** – Customizable debug screen.
- **BetterStats** – Improved statistics interface.
- **Blur** – Smooth blur effect for menus.
- **Chat Heads** – Player icons in chat.
- **Continuity** – Connected and emissive textures.
- **Controlling** – Keybind search & management.
- **Dynamic FPS** – Saves resources when tabbed out.
- **Entity Culling** – Skips rendering unseen entities.
- **Iris + Sodium** – Shaders support and performance boost.
- **LambDynamicLights** – Realistic dynamic lighting.
- **Lithium** – Game optimizations for smoother play.
- **Mod Menu** – Easy mod configuration.
- **Presence Footsteps** – Immersive step sounds.
- **Reese’s Sodium Options** – Extended settings for Sodium.
- **ShulkerBoxTooltip** – Preview shulker box contents.
- **Starlight** – Lightning-fast light engine.
- **Zoomify** – Customizable zoom feature.

## 🎯 Why Choose Palburgo’s Enhanced?
This pack focuses on making Minecraft run better, look cleaner, and feel smoother—all while keeping the vanilla gameplay you love.
